channel.title: Machine Learning on Atom
channel.description: Recent content in Machine Learning on Atom

item.title: Infrastructure of the rml library
item.author: atomwalk@duck.com (Vasile, Razvan Florian)
item.description: Overview of the core infrastructure, covering architectural design, CUDA primitives and Python bindings.

item.title: Logistic Regression
item.author: atomwalk@duck.com (Vasile, Razvan Florian)
item.description: Binary logistic regression as a Bernoulli model: setup, cross-entropy objective, and gradient-based fitting.

item.title: Linear Regression
item.author: atomwalk@duck.com (Vasile, Razvan Florian)
item.description: Ordinary least squares as a linear mean model: setup, normal equations, and gradient updates.
